pages.text: This section covers changes you can make that affect how Craft Tracker determines the best recipe for making something in the queue.$(br2)Configuration values in this section are decimal numbers that determine how the cost of a recipe is adjusted. The value is multiplied against the calculated cost as a percentage, so a value less than 1.0 will lower the cost of a recipe, and higher than 1.0 will raise the cost.

pages.title: Namespaces
pages.text: This is a set of key/value mappings for recipe namespaces, i.e., mod IDs.$(br2)The key is a mod ID, and will affect any recipe that is provided by that mod.

pages.title: Recipe Types
pages.text: This is a set of key/value mappings for recipe types.$(br2)The key is the mod ID and type ID of the recipe type.
